message:
feat(edgeq): add cache, observability, resilience, and diagnostics

Wire up the WASM buffer pool as an R2 page cache (cache-before-fetch
in both QueryDO and FragmentDO), add structured JSON logging with
per-phase timing (r2ReadMs, wasmExecMs) and request ID propagation,
wrap R2 reads with retry/timeout and use Promise.allSettled for
partial fragment failure tolerance, and expose /diagnostics endpoint
with cache utilization, table count, and WASM memory stats.
